title: Longest Subarray of 1's After Deleting One Element
hints: Focus on segments of 1s separated by single 0s. How does deleting that 0 affect the total length?
Use two pointers to maintain a window containing at most one 0. Expand the right end and shrink the left when needed.
The answer is the maximum window size minus one, since one element is always deleted. Handle the all-1s case separately.
